description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a distinctive thumbhole stock and a long, heavy barrel, finished in a striking iridescent purple-blue color. The stock features an ergonomic cheek rest and a cutout for the thumb, providing enhanced stability and comfort for precision shooting. The receiver is robust, with a visible bolt handle on the right side, and the magazine well is located just in front of the trigger guard, though the magazine itself is not visible. The barrel is long and straight, optimized for accuracy at extended ranges, and the muzzle appears to lack any additional device such as a brake or suppressor. The rifle does not have any visible optical or iron sights mounted on the top rail. The overall design suggests a focus on long-range accuracy and stability, typical of tactical or competition rifles.
description: A modern, iridescent purple-blue bolt-action sniper rifle with a thumbhole stock and a long, heavy barrel, designed for precision shooting. The rifle features ergonomic details and lacks visible sights or a muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, thumbhole stock, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, bolt handle, and lack of mounted sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the thumbhole stock and barrel, with receiver details visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the trigger guard, magazine well, and ergonomic stock cutout.
